【后学杯战报】
赛城多媒体大学辩论队在本届后学杯止步于12强，虽有遗憾，但这段旅程让我们收获良多。

特别恭喜张荧宸与罗心言在赛程中分别获得单场最佳辩手的荣誉，这是对他们努力与实力的肯定。

我们也特别感谢登嘉楼大学辩论队、亚太科技大学辩论队以及精英大学辩论队与我们进行友谊赛，让我们在备赛过程中获益匪浅。感谢一路上支持我们的老师、学长姐和队友们，我们会带着这份经验继续前行。

[Hou Xue Cup Update]
The MMU Cyberjaya Debate Team’s journey in the Hou Xue Cup ended at the Top 12. While it comes with some regret, the experience has been invaluable. 

Special congratulations to Cheng Yin Chen and Loh Xin Lan for being awarded as Best Debater in individual rounds, which is a recognition of their dedication and skills.

We would also like to extend our gratitude to the Universiti Malaysia Terengganu Debate Team, the APU Debate Team, and the HELP University Debate Team for engaging with us in friendly matches, which greatly enriched our preparation. We truly appreciate the support of our coaches, seniors, and teammates, and we will carry these lessons forward.

"Debate brings us together, and leads our way further."

caption:
在辩论中，论述与反驳是展示语言魅力与思维深度的核心环节。论述是自我立场的明确表达，通过条理清晰的阐述让观点更具说服力；反驳则是智慧的较量，用精准的逻辑破解对手的论点，为己方争取主动权。 

论述的力量，反驳的巧妙，每一场辩论都在考验我们的表达技巧与逻辑能力。无论你是初学者，想掌握论述与反驳的基础技巧，还是经验丰富的辩手，追求在比赛中更上一层楼，这里将是你提升能力的最佳平台！

In a debate, argumentation and rebuttal are the core elements where the charm of language and the depth of thinking shine. Argumentation is the clear articulation of one’s stance, making the point more persuasive through structured reasoning; rebuttal, on the other hand, is a battle of wits, using precise logic to dismantle the opponent’s case and gain the upper hand. 

The power of argumentation and the ingenuity of rebuttal—every debate hones our skills in expression and logical thinking. Whether you are a beginner looking to master the basics of argumentation and rebuttal, or an experienced debater striving to elevate your performance, this is the perfect platform to refine your skills!
